text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One night, I pass by a movie theater<n>on my way
back from shopping,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeahhh! We made it in time for the<n>late showing!
Two student tickets,<n>please!

text_block_list.name: Box Office Clerk
text_block_list.text: Sorry, no children allowed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! Who you callin' a<n>child?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Creek. Let's head in.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're not kids, it's true... But I don't<n>think we'll
be able to watch this<n>movie, after all...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Look at the time. We'll never make it<n>back
before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Curfew? Crap!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're right, the movie's too long.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What to do... Movie, or curfew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, I know how you feel, Tamtam, but<n>we can't
be late getting back. So<n>there's only one thing to
do, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right! Watch the movie!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And break curfew? Tamtam, when<n>did you
become so naughty?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Stop treatin' me like a child! It'd be<n>whatever if
this was just a regular<n>movie.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But this is True Stories of Showa Umamusume we're talkin' about!I need to watch it now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know my priorities, and gettin'<n>better at runnin'
comes before<n>curfew!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll break whatever rules I have to if it<n>means
doin' something important to<n>me. I'll watch it
alone if I have to!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam... I can't let you go home by<n>yourself so
late at night. So I guess<n>I'll...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Hold on a sec. Looks like it's<n>from my little
brother and sister.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Um... What da heck?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw, forget about it. Sorry, Creek. Can<n>I take a
rain check on the movie?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's nothin'. You're right, we've<n>gotta follow the
rules and all that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, man... I really thought the money I<n>sent would
be enough for Mom's<n>birthday present.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if I send the money I was gonna<n>use tonight,
they should have enough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There we go.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm countin' on ya, runts. Keep Mom<n>and Dad
happy while I'm gone.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to see that movie, but<n>ah well! I
know my priorities!
